result.stderr:
meissa 1.6.15.0
Automate The Planet Ltd. 2020

  runner          Executes Meissa in --runner mode. You need to pass all native
                  runner arguments using the argument nativeRunnerArguments.

  initServer      Set up Meissa test execution server that will be used by all
                  test runners and agents for communication and storing data.

  agent           Executes Meissa in --testAgent mode. When Meissa is started in
                  this mode it will wait for test run commands from test runners
                  connected to the same test execution server.

  dump            Creates a file dump of the test execution logs from all test
                  agents.

  status          Displays the status of the test agents with a specific tag.

  delete          Deletes all test agents' logs.

  setServerUrl    Sets test execution server URL so that you are not prompt for
                  the URL every time.

  help            Display more information on a specific command.

  version         Display version information.

commands.payload:
meissa 1.6.15.0
Automate The Planet Ltd. 2020

  runner          Executes Meissa in --runner mode. You need to pass all native
                  runner arguments using the argument nativeRunnerArguments.

  initServer      Set up Meissa test execution server that will be used by all
                  test runners and agents for communication and storing data.

  agent           Executes Meissa in --testAgent mode. When Meissa is started in
                  this mode it will wait for test run commands from test runners
                  connected to the same test execution server.

  dump            Creates a file dump of the test execution logs from all test
                  agents.

  status          Displays the status of the test agents with a specific tag.

  delete          Deletes all test agents' logs.

  setServerUrl    Sets test execution server URL so that you are not prompt for
                  the URL every time.

  help            Display more information on a specific command.

  version         Display version information.

result.stderr:
meissa 1.6.15.0
Automate The Planet Ltd. 2020

  -u, --server        The test server URL with port that will be used by the
                      test agents and runners to communicate between the
                      machines.

  -t, --tag           Required. The tag will be used to control the test agent
                      remotely and to build a group of test agents. This way you
                      will be able to run a specific set of tests to a group of
                      your test agents.

  -r, --runTimeout    The time in minutes after which the test agent run will be
                      stopped.

  --restarted         Used for internal purposes only.

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.

result.stderr:
meissa 1.6.15.0
Automate The Planet Ltd. 2020

  --results                      Required. The path to the file where all
                                 results will be stored.

  -l, --library                  Required. The path to the tests' library file.

  -t, --tag                      Required. The test agents' tag used to filter
                                 the machines where the tests will be executed.

  --testTechnology               The tests technology that will be used to
                                 execute the tests- MSTest, NUnit, etc.

  -n, --nativeRunnerArguments    The native runner arguments that we use in
                                 addition to Meissa arguments. (e.g. MSTest
                                 /nologo argument).

  -u, --server                   The test server URL with port that will be used
                                 by the test agents and runners to communicate
                                 between the machines.

  -t, --runTimeout               The time in minutes after which the test run
                                 will be stopped.

  -f, --filter                   The filter that will be applied to the whole
                                 set of tests.

  -p, --parallelRun              Specifies whether the tests will be run in
                                 parallel on the test agent machine.

  -m, --maxCount                 Specifies the maximum count of parallel test
                                 run processes. The default one is equal to the
                                 machines' CPU cores count.

  --timeBased                    Specifies whether the tests will be distributed
                                 based on previous execution times.

  --sameMachineByClass           Specifies whether the tests from the same class
                                 will be executed on the same machine. The
                                 default is false.

  --customArguments              Key value pairs. The first parameter will be
                                 the name of the environment variable holding
                                 the second one as value.

  --retries                      How many times the failed tests will be
                                 retried.

  --threshold                    If the percentage of the failed tests is bigger
                                 than the specified threshold %, no next reruns
                                 will be performed.

  --retriedResults               The path to the file where all retied results
                                 will be stored.

  --help                         Display this help screen.

  --version                      Display version information.

staticCommands.name: agent

options.description: The tag will be used to control the test agent remotely and to build a group of test agents. This way you will be able to run a specific set of tests to a group of your test agents.
Used for internal purposes only.
The time in minutes after which the test agent run will be stopped.
The test server URL with port that will be used by the test agents and runners to communicate between the machines.
